name: Spinach Salad with Pine Nut Dressing
recipeIngredient: 7 tablespoons olive oil, or salad oil
1 1/2 pounds fresh spinach (wash and remove stems)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the pine nuts in a shallow baking pan until lightly browned, stirring occasionally for 5-8 minutes at 350°F. Let cool.
2. In a bowl, combine toasted pine nuts, olive oil, wine vinegar, ground nutmeg, grated lemon peel, and dried tarragon. Cover and let stand at room temperature for at least 30 minutes or until the next day.
3. To serve, select large leaves of spinach to line 8 salad plates. Cut remaining spinach into thin slivers and mound on plates. Stir the dressing to blend, then drizzle over salads. Season with salt to taste.
